original.selection_notes: Baseline prompt before any optimization. Selected as original because it has no Input Reading Checklist, no MCP fallback path, no inlined approval bar, and an underspecified output format.

student.selection_notes: Student candidate based on optimizer output plus one targeted teacher-guided fix: clarified run_agent_skill guidance-only clause. Addresses all six engineer-prompt review issues.

adversary.selection_notes: Soft MCP fallback substitution exploit. Predicted to lose on all eval dimensions vs. student candidate. Not credible — no write-back blocking.

winner_reasoning: Student candidate addresses all six engineer-prompt review issues. Adversary exploit was not credible. Adversary candidate loses on 7 of 8 eval dimensions.
